rationale: CS & AI L4 decomposes each L3 community into the named technical sub-topics authors self-identify with. ML splits architecture/training/scaling/post-training; LLM reasoning split CoT, search, agents, tool use; vision split detection, segmentation, generation by modality (image/video/3D). Systems splits storage/network/cloud/serving/edge. Security splits crypto by primitive, system security by attack class. Theory split complexity/algo-design/learning-theory.

uncovered_concerns: Computer Architecture & Hardware L2/L3 has no L4 children in CS file — papers fold under EE's AI hardware leaves or under ML systems leaves here.
Graphics & Visualization L2 also has no L4 in CS — folds under 3D vision / generative image L4.
